tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]
[ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch]  x2

[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch] 
       Yeah yeah yeah yeah yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch] [ch]C#m[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]                   [ch]C#m[/ch]
  I think I did it again[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]G#[/ch]
I made you believe were more than just friends, oh baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]G#[/ch]           [ch]C#m[/ch]
It might seem like a crush[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]G#[/ch]
But it doesn't mean that I'm serious[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]G#[/ch]
Cause to lose all my senses[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]A[/ch]                 [ch]B[/ch]
That is just so typically me[/tab]

Oh baby, baby


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]G#[/ch]      [ch]C#m[/ch]

[tab]  [ch]B[/ch]                [ch]E[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]           [ch]E[/ch]

[tab]         [ch]B[/ch]         [ch]E[/ch]
That I'm sent from above[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G#[/ch]
I'm not that innocent[/tab]


[Verse 2]

  You see my problem is this[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]A[/ch]
I'm dreaming away[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G#[/ch]                   
Wishing that heroes, they truly exist[/tab]

  I cry, watching the days[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]A[/ch]                [ch]G#[/ch]
Can't you see I'm a fool in so many ways[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]G#[/ch]
But to lose all my senses[/tab]

Baby, oh

Britney, before you go, there's something I want you to have
